message:
Implement P3.1a: Session Management & Key Storage

- Add session.js module for secure session lifecycle management
- Support multiple storage options: memory, sessionStorage, localStorage
- Encrypt DEK with session key before storing
- Configurable session duration (default 4 hours)
- Activity-based session extension on user interaction
- Session expiry warning before timeout
- Proper DEK zeroization on session end
- Page visibility and unload handlers for cleanup

Part of Phase 3: Web Viewer (coding_agent_session_search-uok7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
